mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_message_info ( msg_id, msgtype, flag, receiver, sender, sender_name, is_room, room_id, server_id, send_time, referid, app_info, readuinscount, kf_id, content, issync, at_list, url, width, height, emotion_type, thumb_file_id, title, app_name, thumb_md5, pagepath, size, appid, thumb_aes_key, username, weapp_icon_url, `desc`, file_size, file_id, openim_cdn_authkey, aes_key, md5 ) VALUES ( #{msgId}, #{msgtype}, #{flag}, #{receiver}, #{sender}, #{senderName}, #{isRoom}, #{roomId}, #{serverId}, #{sendTime}, #{referid}, #{appInfo}, #{readuinscount}, #{kfId}, #{content}, #{issync}, #{atList}, #{url}, #{width}, #{height}, #{emotionType}, #{thumbFileId}, #{title}, #{appName}, #{thumbMd5}, #{pagepath}, #{size}, #{appid}, #{thumbAesKey}, #{username}, #{weappIconUrl}, #{desc}, #{fileSize}, #{fileId}, #{openimCdnAuthkey}, #{aesKey}, #{md5} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_message_info SET msg_id = #{msgId}, msgtype = #{msgtype}, flag = #{flag}, receiver = #{receiver}, sender = #{sender}, sender_name = #{senderName}, is_room = #{isRoom}, room_id = #{roomId}, server_id = #{serverId}, send_time = #{sendTime}, referid = #{referid}, app_info = #{appInfo}, readuinscount = #{readuinscount}, kf_id = #{kfId}, content = #{content}, issync = #{issync}, at_list = #{atList}, url = #{url}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, emotion_type = #{emotionType}, thumb_file_id = #{thumbFileId}, title = #{title}, app_name = #{appName}, thumb_md5 = #{thumbMd5}, pagepath = #{pagepath}, size = #{size}, appid = #{appid}, thumb_aes_key = #{thumbAesKey}, username = #{username}, weapp_icon_url = #{weappIconUrl}, `desc` = #{desc}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_id = #{fileId}, openim_cdn_authkey = #{openimCdnAuthkey}, aes_key = #{aesKey}, md5 = #{md5} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wx_message_info ( msg_id, msgtype, flag, receiver, sender, sender_name, is_room, room_id, server_id, send_time, referid, app_info, readuinscount, kf_id, content, issync, at_list, url, width, height, emotion_type, thumb_file_id, title, app_name, thumb_md5, pagepath, size, appid, thumb_aes_key, username, weapp_icon_url, `desc`, file_size, file_id, openim_cdn_authkey, aes_key, md5 ) VALUES
( #{item.msgId}, #{item.msgtype}, #{item.flag}, #{item.receiver}, #{item.sender}, #{item.senderName}, #{item.isRoom}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.serverId}, #{item.sendTime}, #{item.referid}, #{item.appInfo}, #{item.readuinscount}, #{item.kfId}, #{item.content}, #{item.issync}, #{item.atList}, #{item.url}, #{item.width}, #{item.height}, #{item.emotionType}, #{item.thumbFileId}, #{item.title}, #{item.appName}, #{item.thumbMd5}, #{item.pagepath}, #{item.size}, #{item.appid}, #{item.thumbAesKey}, #{item.username}, #{item.weappIconUrl}, #{item.desc}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileId}, #{item.openimCdnAuthkey}, #{item.aesKey}, #{item.md5} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wx_message_info WHERE send_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
